# PepExact

> Independent educational measurement utility: vial + water + dose → U-100 syringe units, with the arithmetic shown.

Site: https://pepexact.com
Purpose: Transparent peptide reconstitution and syringe-unit arithmetic. Not a clinic, marketplace, or dosing advisor. Does not sell peptides and does not provide medical advice.

## Principal tools

- https://pepexact.com/peptide-calculator — peptide calculator (flagship)
- https://pepexact.com/reconstitution-calculator — peptide reconstitution calculator (target draw → water)
- https://pepexact.com/syringe-units-calculator — U-100 syringe units ⇄ mL
- https://pepexact.com/mg-to-mcg-converter — mg to mcg converter

## Compound calculators (same engine)

- https://pepexact.com/calculator/bpc-157
- https://pepexact.com/calculator/retatrutide

## Guides & policy

- https://pepexact.com/methodology — calculation methodology
- https://pepexact.com/editorial-policy — what we publish and omit
- https://pepexact.com/guides/mg-vs-mcg
- https://pepexact.com/guides/how-to-read-an-insulin-syringe
- https://pepexact.com/guides/why-calculators-disagree
- https://pepexact.com/guides/peptide-regulators
